title: Evacuated From War-Torn Gaza, 11 Toddlers Return Home to Hugs and Tears
summary_full: The Palestinian children were born prematurely in the early days of the war and moved from a besieged hospital to Egypt. They have now returned home to the enclave, which lies in ruins.
summary_public: The Palestinian children were born prematurely in the early days of the war and moved from a besieged hospital to Egypt. They have now returned home to the enclave, which lies in ruins.
